UtilityPower.title: Utility Power
UtilityPower.subtitle: Transformer Testing & Load Management
UtilityPower.paragraph: A 35 kW load bank is used for transformer testing and managing utility power fluctuations. It applies controlled load to validate voltage regulation, thermal performance, and capacity. In dynamic conditions, it absorbs excess or varying power, stabilizing voltage and preventing equipment stress. Compact and portable, it ensures safe, reliable performance testing and power system stability.
list: Install Type: Stationary / Permanent, Trailer Mounted, Outdoor Use

GasTurbine.title: Gas Turbine
GasTurbine.subtitle: Prime Power Generation
GasTurbine.paragraph: A 20 MW, 13.8 kV load bank supports gas turbine testing and operation by applying controlled medium-voltage load to validate performance, stability, and response during commissioning or maintenance. It helps maintain minimum load for efficient turbine operation. In dynamic conditions, it absorbs excess or fluctuating power, stabilizing output and protecting equipment for reliable, continuous performance.
list: Install Type: Stationary / Permanent, Trailer Mounted, Outdoor Use

MvSwitchgear.title: MV Switchgear
MvSwitchgear.subtitle: Main Power Distribution
MvSwitchgear.paragraph: Intelligent, automated power routing across MV infrastructure. Unified control of multiple distribution networks. Real-time operational insight with historical analytics.

MvSwitchgear2.title: MV Switchgear 2
MvSwitchgear2.subtitle: Main Power Distribution
MvSwitchgear2.paragraph: Intelligent, automated power routing across MV infrastructure. Unified control of multiple distribution networks. Real-time operational insight with historical analytics.

DistributionSwitchgear.title: Distribution Switchgear
DistributionSwitchgear.subtitle: Secondary Distribution
DistributionSwitchgear.paragraph: A 3 MW DC load bank (R3000, up to 1000 VDC), scalable up to 100 MW, supports BESS testing and operation by applying controlled resistive load to validate performance, discharge behavior, and system response. It enables continuous-duty testing and absorbs excess or fluctuating energy, stabilizing output and protecting battery systems for safe, reliable, and efficient operation.
list: Load bank: R3000 DC self-contained, outdoor stationary load bank
Load rating: 3000 kw at 1000 VDC, 3000 kw at 500 VDC

DieselGenerator.title: Diesel Generator
DieselGenerator.subtitle: Emergency Backup System
DieselGenerator.paragraph: A diesel backup load bank solution (up to 6 MW) supports generator testing and operation by applying controlled AC resistive load to validate performance, reliability, and system response during commissioning and maintenance. Using stationary RL6250 Series load banks and portable R2000 trailer-mounted units , it enables continuous-duty testing, maintains optimal loading to prevent wet stacking, and simulates real operating conditions. In dynamic scenarios, it absorbs excess or varying load, stabilizing output and protecting generator systems—ensuring safe, reliable, and efficient backup power operation.

lists.subtitle: Stationary
items: Load Bank: RL6250 Series, Self Contained, Stationary / Permanent Load Bank

lists.subtitle: Portable / Trailer Mounted
items: Load Bank: R2000 TR Series, Self Contained, Trailer Mounted Load Bank
Load Rating: Rating: 2000kW, Voltage: 480 VAC, Phase: 3 phase, Frequency: 60 Hz, Load Step Resolution: 25kW
Install Type: Stationary / Permanent, Outdoor Use, Trailer Mounted

ServerCluster.title: Rack and Servers
ServerCluster.subtitle: High-Density Computing
ServerCluster.paragraph: The white space (data hall/facility level) represents aggregated multi-megawatt IT loads with dynamic, AI-driven fluctuations. DC and liquid-cooled load banks enable precise replication of these conditions by emulating real rack-level power and thermal behavior. They validate system performance across UPS, switchgear, and cooling infrastructure, absorb rapid load changes, and help maintain voltage and system stability—ensuring reliable operation under real-world, high-density conditions.

items:
Load Rating: 900 KW at 700 VDC
-various configurations available
Load Rating: 3000 kW at 1000 VDC, 3000 kW at 500 VDC
Install Type: Portable, Indoor Use, Outdoor Use

ServerCluster2.title: Liquid Cooled Rack and Servers
ServerCluster2.paragraph: Universal Load Banks (ULB) offers advanced liquid-cooled load bank solutions designed for high-density, continuous-duty applications in modern data centers and mission-critical environments. Our current portfolio includes 500 kW and 720 kW units , with a 1 MW platform coming soon, enabling scalable deployment from single-unit testing to multi-MW system validation. Built for performance, safety, and reliability, ULB liquid-cooled load banks feature ASME-stamped pressure vessels and are UL listed, ensuring compliance with the highest industry standards while delivering precise thermal and electrical load simulation.
list: Load bank: R3000 DC self-contained, outdoor stationary load bank
Load rating: 3000 kw at 1000 VDC, 3000 kw at 500 VDC

items: Install Type: Portable, Indoor Use, Outdoor Use
